executives.name: Paul Rollinson
executives.background: Mr. Rollinson was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer on August 1, 2012. He joined Kinross as Executive Vice-President, New Projects in September 2008 and was appointed Executive Vice-President, Corporate Development in September 2009. Prior to joining Kinross, Mr. Rollinson was at Deutsche Bank AG where he was most recently Deputy Head of Investment Banking (Canada) and Head of the Americas Metals and Mining Group. He has over 20 years of investment banking experience.

executives.name: Andrea Freeborough
executives.background: Ms. Freeborough was appointed Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer on May 1, 2019. She joined Kinross in 2009 and has held several positions within the finance team, including Vice-President, Finance and Vice-President, Investor Relations and Corporate Development. Prior to joining Kinross, she was an Associate Partner at KPMG LLP.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Claude Schimper
executives.background: Mr. Schimper was appointed Executive Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer on July 1, 2022. He was previously Executive Vice-President, Russia and West Africa Operations. He joined Kinross in 2010 and has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice-President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Geoffrey Gold
executives.background: Mr. Gold was appointed Executive Vice-President, Corporate Development, External Relations and Chief Legal Officer on January 1, 2016. He joined Kinross in May 2006 as Senior Vice-President and General Counsel.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice-President, Corporate Development, External Relations and Chief Legal Officer
Senior Vice-President and Chief Legal Officer

executives.name: Candace MacGibbon
executives.background: Ms. MacGibbon is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining sector and capital markets.

executives.name: Elizabeth McGregor
executives.background: Ms. McGregor was previously the CFO of Tahoe Resources Inc. and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

executives.name: Glenn Ives
executives.background: Mr. Ives was the Chair of Deloitte Canada from 2010 to 2018 and has significant financial and governance expertise.

executives.name: Timothy Baker
executives.background: Timothy Baker has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Kinross Gold Corporation and held various executive positions at Placer Dome.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Warwick Morley-Jepson
executives.background: Mr. Morley-Jepson has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Kinross Gold and Gold Fields Limited.

executives.name: Paul Tomory
executives.background: Mr. Tomory was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Centerra Gold in May 2023. Prior to joining Centerra, he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Technical Officer at Kinross Gold Corporation from 2017 to 2023. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Technical Officer

board_of_directors.name: Catherine McLeod-Seltzer
board_of_directors.background: Ms. McLeod-Seltzer is an independent director and has been the Chair of the Board since 2019. She is a recognized leader in the minerals industry and has helped raise over $600 million in working capital for mining exploration.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Rollinson
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Kinross Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Atkinson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Atkinson was previously the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has extensive experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Glenn Ives
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ives was the Chair of Deloitte Canada from 2010 to 2018 and has significant financial and governance expertise.

board_of_directors.name: Elizabeth McGregor
board_of_directors.background: Ms. McGregor was previously the CFO of Tahoe Resources Inc. and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

board_of_directors.background: Ms. MacGibbon is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the mining sector and capital markets.
